_meta.title: Andjix Consulting Inc. : Tax firm for immigrants in Ottawa · EFILE Certified
_meta.description: T1, T2125, and T2 tax returns for immigrants in Ottawa. First year in Canada, Ontario-Quebec cross-border, self-employed. Bilingual EN/FR. EFILE certified by CRA.

hero.eyebrow: Ottawa's tax firm for immigrants · EFILE Certified by CRA
hero.title: Your tax return. Done right. By an expert.
hero.lede: First year in Canada, self-employed, Ontario-Quebec cross-border, immigrant family: Andjix prepares and files your Canadian tax returns (T1, T2125, T2) with expertise that generic software simply doesn't have.
hero.trust: EFILE Certified · Bilingual EN/FR · Ottawa · Immigrant specialist

intro.title: Generic software doesn't know your reality.
intro.lede: Generic software doesn't know you arrived in June. It ignores your foreign income, your tax treaty, and your first-year credits. Andjix does. Every return is prepared by an advisor who understands the immigrant reality in Ottawa.
intro.stat1_desc: A meaningful share settles in Ottawa with complex tax situations that standard software handles poorly.
intro.stat2_desc: First year in Canada, Ontario-Quebec cross-border, T2125 self-employed, foreign income and tax treaties.
intro.stat3_desc: Permanent resident, refugee, student, temporary worker, self-employed, family: every situation deserves a tailored return.
intro.stat4_desc: General tax questions answered in French and English at any hour. Human certified advisor handles the filing and complex files.
intro.callout: Your return signed and e-filed by an EFILE-certified expert, not an algorithm.

pillars.title: Tax first. Everything else, within reach.
pillars.lede: Tax preparation is our core, immediately operational service. For other needs, we point you to the right resources.
pillars.p1_desc: T1, T2125, T2 · First year in Canada · Ontario-Quebec cross-border · Newcomer credits · EFILE certified by CRA. From $120.
pillars.p2_desc: Connecting you with bilingual employers in Ottawa. Submit your profile and we will put you in touch with our network of employers in the region.
pillars.p3_desc: Free 20-minute orientation session via Calendly. We work with OCISO and ACFO to direct you to the right resources for your status.
pillars.p4_desc: Tax and settlement questions answered in EN and FR, 24/7. General information only — for your actual return, an EFILE-certified advisor takes over.

rupture.title: Where generic software and generalists stop, Andjix begins.
rupture.lede: Generic software and general-practice accountants are built for the "typical" Canadian taxpayer. Immigrants have different situations — and deserve an expert who knows it.
rupture.row1_classic: Built for the typical taxpayer — not for first-year residents or foreign income situations.
rupture.row1_andjix: Specialized: first year in Canada, foreign income, tax treaties, Ontario-Quebec cross-border.
rupture.row2_classic: $80 to $200 with no real support. You fill it in yourself, you face the CRA alone.
rupture.row2_andjix: $120 to $295 depending on your situation — an advisor prepares, signs, and takes responsibility.
rupture.row3_classic: No knowledge of your first-year credits, Canada Child Benefit, Trillium or T1135.
rupture.row3_andjix: Full command of newcomer credits, moving deductions and CRA-specific immigrant forms.
rupture.row4_classic: No professional EFILE signature — if the CRA audits, you handle it alone.
rupture.row4_andjix: Return signed and e-filed via EFILE — professional accountability engaged on your file.
rupture.row5_classic: Business hours only, no local Ottawa-Gatineau knowledge.
rupture.row5_andjix: Bilingual EN/FR, Andjix AI available 24/7, full command of both Ontario and Quebec tax regimes.

audience.title: A path tailored to your situation.
audience.lede: Choose your profile to access the steps, benefits and information that apply to you.
audience.p1_desc: Status confirmation, federal benefits, family sponsorship, PR card, and maintaining status under the 730-day rule.
audience.p2_desc: IFHP, RAP income support, first-12-month transition, referenced psychological support and steps toward PR.
audience.p3_desc: Study permit, authorized work hours, PGWP, transition to PR via EEC, and resident vs. non-resident tax status.
audience.p4_desc: LMIA, francophone mobility outside Quebec, pathways to permanent residency and optimizing your work permit.
audience.p5_desc: Family reunification, Super Visa for parents and grandparents, sponsorship obligations and school registration steps.
audience.p6_desc: Access to the Andjix bilingual talent pool, hiring support, and workplace integration programs.

ia_band.title: A real AI, not a basic chatbot.
ia_band.lede: Andjix AI asks the right questions, understands your situation, and builds a clear plan. See it in action.
ia_band.feature3: Booked sessions with our expert team

band.title: Start your tax return today.
band.lede: Three minutes to fill in your intake form. Our team gets back to you within 24 business hours.

about_teaser.title: Born from necessity, built for impact.
about_teaser.lede: Bilingual team, experienced in administration, tax, and recruitment, established in Ottawa. We close the gap between classic welcome services and individualized support.

footer.tag: Tax, professional and administrative support in Ottawa and Gatineau. Bilingual EN/FR.

about_page.hero_title: Born from necessity, built for impact.
about_page.hero_lede: Andjix Consulting Inc. is an administrative, tax, and professional support firm based in Ottawa.
about_page.section1_title: A bilingual team, trained for the Canadian system.
about_page.section1_p1: Andjix Consulting Inc. was founded by bilingual professionals based in Ottawa. Academic training in administration and taxation, completed by deep Canadian experience. Over a decade of private-sector activity: business management, tax compliance, recruitment.
about_page.section1_p2: Established in Canada for several years, they have a deep working knowledge of the administrative system, federal institutions, and the real needs of newcomers.
about_page.p1_desc: Operational experience of Canadian administration. Deep working knowledge of federal and provincial institutions and their procedures.
about_page.p2_desc: Postgraduate diploma in tax (D.E.S.S.), complemented by Canadian training in business administration. Mastery of the CRA and Canadian tax obligations.
about_page.p3_desc: Expertise of the Canadian job market: CV adaptation, interview coaching, employer-candidate matching, and placement follow-up.
about_page.why_p: Because classic welcome services do precious work, but cannot offer individualized follow-through, available at any hour, in your language, with the expertise of professionals who know the system from the inside. Andjix fills that gap.
about_page.why_quote: It's not name recognition that helps you. It's expertise.
about_page.v1_desc: Your documents and data are protected to PIPEDA standards. See our privacy policy.
about_page.v2_desc: No hidden fees. You know what each service costs before we begin.
about_page.v3_desc: We also handle sliding-scale files for clients in financial hardship.
about_page.cta_title: Ready to talk to our team?
about_page.cta_lede: Start with Andjix AI, or book a session with an advisor directly.

particuliers.hero_title: A path tailored to each profile.
particuliers.hero_lede: Whether you're arriving this week, running a self-employed activity, or preparing your next tax return, here's how Andjix supports you.
particuliers.s1_lede: Individuals, self-employed, corporations. Everything to file correctly and maximize your credits.
particuliers.s1_b1: T1 individual: employment income, students, retirees
particuliers.s1_b4: Slip collection, credits, CRA filing, and follow-up on the notice of assessment

particuliers.s2_b1: SIN, OHIP, banking, Ontario driver's licence
particuliers.s2_b5: Government benefits: CCB, dental care, provincial programs
particuliers.s3_lede: From CV adaptation to contract signing. For those looking for a first Canadian job or a change.

particuliers.s3_b2: Interview coaching, mock interviews, salary negotiation
particuliers.s4_lede: For individuals and self-employed workers who want to understand their obligations without hiring a full-time accountant.
particuliers.s4_b1: Understand your CRA notice of assessment
particuliers.s5_lede: Our flagship package for newcomers who want to reach independence in a quarter.
particuliers.s5_b1: Month 1: settling in and urgent admin
particuliers.s5_b3: Month 3: independence, tax filing, professional integration
particuliers.s5_b4: Structured monthly reviews, priority advisor access
particuliers.cta_title: Not sure of the right path?
particuliers.cta_lede: Launch Andjix AI. Five minutes later, you'll have clear direction.

pme.hero_lede: For Ottawa SMEs, nonprofits, and associations who want to double capacity without building a tech team. Tailored tools, incorporation support.
pme.s1_lede: Your client onboarding, document collection, and follow-up automated. You keep the human relationship; the AI handles the rest.
pme.s1_b1: Automated client onboarding tools (smart forms, qualification, scheduling)
pme.s1_b3: Airtable or equivalent CRM: clear pipeline, auto follow-ups, dashboard
pme.s1_b4: Integrated workflows across your existing tools (Gmail, Drive, Slack, calendar)
pme.s1_uc2: Nonprofits handling registrations or aid requests
pme.s2_lede: From idea to incorporation. We build the file; you keep 100% of the control.
pme.s2_b2: Federal (Corporations Canada) or provincial (Ontario Business Registry) incorporation
pme.s2_b5: SME compliance: registers, annual filings, accounting obligations
pme.cta_lede: First discovery call free, in English or French.

ia_page.hero_title: A real AI for integrating into Canada.
ia_page.hero_lede: Not a scripted chatbot. An intelligent assistant trained in Canadian administration, CRA tax matters, recruitment, and arrival procedures in Ottawa. It asks the right questions and points you forward.
ia_page.how_step1_desc: In English or French, freely. Andjix AI catches the nuances: your status, your profile, your urgent needs.
ia_page.how_step2_title: The AI asks the right questions
ia_page.how_step2_desc: It doesn't reply with generic links. It digs in, like an experienced advisor would, until it understands your real case.
ia_page.how_step3_desc: A clear summary of what you can do alone, and what warrants an in-depth session with our expert team. With links, deadlines, and dollar amounts.

ia_page.demo_caption: Ready to try? Launch Andjix AI and start your own diagnosis.

temoignages.hero_lede: Anonymized case studies and key figures from files handled by Andjix.
temoignages.stat1_label: of clients reach independence in under 90 days
temoignages.stat3_label: average time to a first in-depth session
temoignages.case1_title: Four people, ninety days, full independence.
temoignages.case1_p: Family of four arriving from francophone Africa to Ottawa. SIN, OHIP, banking, school for both kids, language classes for the parents, a first job for the head of household, first-month tax filing. All delivered in 90 days, on a sliding-scale package.
temoignages.case2_title: An Uber driver who hadn't filed in years.
temoignages.case2_p: Uber driver in Ottawa for three years, never filed his income taxes. Three-year CRA backfile cleared, payment plan negotiated, monthly instalment tracking set up. Estimated savings: $4,200 in penalties avoided.
temoignages.case3_title: A consultancy doubled in capacity, no hires.
temoignages.case3_p: HR consulting firm in Ottawa, three-person team at full load. Automated client intake set up: lead qualification, scheduling, document collection. Capacity doubled, no hires, ROI in less than four months.
temoignages.v1_quote: "They walked us through everything from the SIN to my husband's first job. It was the first time we felt heard in French."
temoignages.v2_quote: "Andjix cleared three years of CRA backlog in a few weeks. I'm not stressed about April 30 anymore."
temoignages.v3_quote: "The automated intake system they built saved us two days a week."
temoignages.cta_title: Your case could be the next one.
temoignages.cta_lede: Free diagnosis. Let's see what Andjix can do for you.
